name: Adebayo T.
title: Business Owner, Ibadan
text: To say that EazyLife has been a blessing is an understatement. I got my laptop at the best price in Ibadan — genuine, fast, and no stories.

name: Funmi j. K.
title: Student, UI Ibadan
text: My laptop was completely dead. EazyLife diagnosed and fixed it within a day. The price was fair and they even followed up to check it was working.

name: Emmanuel M.
title: Engineering Student, Ibadan
text: I needed a custom Arduino project for my final year. EazyLife understood exactly what I needed and delivered on time. Highly recommend.
